title: audiobook.book v1
description: Cached metadata for one audiobook edition, distinct from the written book because narrator, duration, language, release date and provider id may differ. Item IDs are deterministic: random bits from the first 80 bits of sha256('provider|providerId') for the first provider seen, so watchers upsert instead of duplicating. Cover art must be downloaded into a blob (attachment role 'artwork'); cover.url is provenance only and will rot.

position.description: Verbatim provider sequence; a string because it may be non-integer, e.g. '1', '1.5'.

releaseDate.description: Verbatim provider string; the format is self-describing precision ('2020', '2020-09', '2020-09-03').

cover.description: Provenance record of the provider's cover URL. The durable copy is the 'artwork' attachment blob.
